title: The Straw Hats Are Cornered
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on the straw hats are cornered, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Straw Hats Are Cornered. Crocodile uses Rain Dinners and Baroque Works to capture his enemies and reveal the shape of Operation Utopia. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: The prisons at the Marine HQ all have cages made itth seasons,

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: To prevent devil-fruit users from using their abilities and escaping.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: There's still a lot of mysteries surrounding this mineral but what we do know is that it emits the same type of energy as the sea.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: It's best to think of it as a solidi- fled form of the sea.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: So that's what's been sapping Luffy's power...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Then these cages too are made with-

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: If they weren't, I'd already be long gone from here.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: That is, after I've personally seen to it that none of you would ever be able to head out for the seas again...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: gyaaa! No, wait, wait! You can't fight now!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: And zero! Your swords won't work on him!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Unsherthe

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: That's right. I suggest you stop.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: As fellow prisoners doomed to the same death,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Why not make peace with each other...?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Croco- dile...!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: You certainly live up to your reputa- tion as a wild dog, Capt. Smoker.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It appears you mistrusted me from the start.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You were wise to do so, of course.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: I'll tell the World Government you tragically died in an "accident," while bravely fighting that small-time pirate Straw-Eat, haha.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I don't know what brings you to this country but I'm sure you weren't under any orders. Probably acting independently as usual.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: And since the World Government will have no reason to doubt me, I don't think any more marines will come here to check up on me...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So that's one of the Shichibukai...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So it's you...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: tense...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You're the one called Crogo- Dile...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey you!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: FIGHT in...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Stop touching the bars, you idiot!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Well done in making it all the way here, Straw-Eat Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I never imagined I'd be meeting you in person.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll kill you in due time but do wait a little longer.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: After all, our guest of honour has yet to arrive.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But don't worry, I've sent my partner to escort her here.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Quite the fight you put up, princess.

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: You live up to your reputa- flow as an ex- frontier agent.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: But your resistance ends here! Hahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: I can't die in a place like this! I still have to get to rain dinners...!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: gyaa!

summary: This part develops the straw hats are cornered and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
